title: Mercado de la Boqueria
description: Morning sounds of the iconic covered market – vendors calling, footsteps on marble, the clatter of stalls opening.

title: Fontana di Trevi at Dawn
description: The constant cascade of Rome's most famous fountain before the tourist crowds arrive.

title: Aegean Wave Field
description: Waves breaking against volcanic cliffs, seabirds overhead, wind through the caldera.

title: Fado do Porto
description: A late-night fado performance recorded in a traditional tasca in the Ribeira district.

title: Camargue Wetlands
description: Dawn chorus in the Camargue delta – flamingos, herons and reed warblers across still water.

title: Sea Organ of Zadar
description: The unique tones produced by sea waves pushing air through marble steps along the Zadar promenade.

title: Fiesta Mayor Drums
description: Percussion procession during Las Fallas – hundreds of drummers filling the streets.

title: Dolomiti Forest
description: Silence interrupted only by wind in spruce trees and the distant call of a golden eagle.
